title: phyllanthus engleri
intro: Phyllanthus engleri, also known as Engler's phyllanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating liver and kidney disorders due to its hepatoprotective and nephroprotective properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and aiding in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Phyllanthus engleri can be consumed as a tea, taken as a tincture, or used in traditional medicine to reap its medicinal benefits.
